attempts.result_summary: Replay voice planning artifacts now carry a typed timeline binding contract, per-segment transcript-audio-offset-ms bindings, replay-engine preconditions, proof obligations, and explicit unsupported claims. Replay behavior tests and live demonstration remain owed.

attempts.action: Expose replay voice execution status and proof obligations in the operator review surface and browser-verify that it does not claim execution.

command.command: generate synthetic packet and inspect artifacts; static local review server; mcp__playwright.browser_navigate http://127.0.0.1:8782/review-artifact.html; mcp__playwright.browser_take_screenshot; mcp__playwright.browser_evaluate replay voice execution boundary checks; .codex/skills/narrated-record-replay/scripts/check

attempts.result_summary: The review surface now exposes replayVoiceExecutionStatus and replayVoiceProofObligations from the replay voice contract, and browser proof confirmed the rendered review keeps execution unclaimed. Replay behavior tests and live demonstration remain owed.

attempts.action: Add a replay-voice-preview command that consumes typed replay voice parameters and writes a deterministic dry-run execution plan.

command.command: cargo run --quiet --manifest-path .codex/skills/narrated-record-replay/Cargo.toml -- packet --session-dir /tmp/nrr-replay-voice-preview-proof-20260619T2130/session --replay-voice-style calm --replay-voice-pace slow --replay-voice-emphasis high; cargo run --quiet --manifest-path .codex/skills/narrated-record-replay/Cargo.toml -- replay-voice-preview --session-dir /tmp/nrr-replay-voice-preview-proof-20260619T2130/session; cargo test --manifest-path .codex/skills/narrated-record-replay/Cargo.toml; .codex/skills/narrated-record-replay/scripts/check

attempts.result_summary: The CLI now writes replay-voice-execution-plan.json with dry-run scheduling cues that consume style, pace, and emphasis. Tests prove parameter-dependent scheduling, but audio playback and live demonstration remain owed.

attempts.action: Expose the dry-run replay voice execution plan in inspection and review surfaces with browser proof that it remains a no-audio preview.

command.command: cargo fmt --manifest-path .codex/skills/narrated-record-replay/Cargo.toml -- --check; cargo test --manifest-path .codex/skills/narrated-record-replay/Cargo.toml; cargo test --manifest-path .codex/skills/narrated-record-replay/Cargo.toml; generate synthetic packet/preview/inspect artifacts; jq packet-inspection.json and review-contract.json preview fields; static local review server; mcp__playwright.browser_navigate http://127.0.0.1:8782/review-artifact.html; mcp__playwright.browser_evaluate replay voice preview plan DOM checks

attempts.result_summary: Replay voice preview plans are now first-class review and inspection artifacts with visible dry-run status, cue count, and speaksAudio=false. Actual replay engine/audio behavior tests and live demonstration remain owed.

attempts.action: Generate a dry-run replay voice execution plan from the 2026-06-21 non-toy dogfood.

command.command: coordinated Record & Replay start plus capture; packet; replay-voice-preview; inspect; receipt; parent-operation-receipt

attempts.result_summary: The real run produced replay-voice-execution-plan.json with dry-run status, one cue, and speaksAudio=false. Actual replay-engine/audio behavior proof remains owed.

rows.next_action: Connect the 2026-06-21 dry-run replay voice execution plan to an actual replay engine/audio surface, add behavior proof that style/pace/emphasis affect playback, and run a live demonstration.
rows.required_proof: Typed timeline contract, replay behavior tests, and live demonstration.

attempts.action: Add Rust-native offline fixture coverage for high realtime delay, cleanup dictionary construction, final transcript alignment, and evidence/report surfacing without microphone or OpenAI calls.
attempts.result_summary: Offline fixture coverage proves the repaired prompt privacy, dictionary privacy, and marker-independent token-alignment behavior. It does not prove real retained audio, real OpenAI batch transcription, cleanup model availability, or video/event alignment quality.

rows.next_action: Run a bounded dogfood through the installed narrated-record-replay plugin, then inspect retained-audio.wav, batch-transcript.json, cleaned-transcript.json, final-transcript-alignment.json, evidence-boundary-report.json, review-contract.json, and Record & Replay video/events before raising the claim ceiling.
rows.required_proof: Live dogfood must prove retained same-stream audio, OpenAI batch transcription, conservative cleanup, final transcript alignment, review mismatch surfacing, and operator-confirmed alignment against Record & Replay video/events.

attempts.action: Add Rust-native delay-eval command and generate a high-delay baseline from the latest private dogfood without copying raw transcript or audio content.

command.command: cargo test --manifest-path .codex/skills/narrated-record-replay/Cargo.toml delay_eval && cargo run --quiet --manifest-path .codex/skills/narrated-record-replay/Cargo.toml -- delay-eval --session-dir /private/tmp/narrated-record-replay/1782167614-0-0-7-aligned-transcript-video-dogfood-run --recording-metadata /var/folders/6n/9_g0pjg51lg2s6hnlnf1q8hh0000gn/T/sky/event_stream/851F87AB-603E-46E3-B90B-A7725344149B/session.json --recording-events /var/folders/6n/9_g0pjg51lg2s6hnlnf1q8hh0000gn/T/sky/event_stream/851F87AB-603E-46E3-B90B-A7725344149B/events.jsonl

attempts.result_summary: Delay-eval now writes privacy-safe timing/count metrics and produced a high-delay baseline. A paired low-delay live dogfood and operator usefulness review remain owed before changing the default.

attempts.action: Add retained-audio sample-span metadata, narration sync sentinels, and Rust-native delay-compare artifact before the paired low-delay dogfood.

command.command: cargo test --manifest-path .codex/skills/narrated-record-replay/Cargo.toml delay_compare && cargo test --manifest-path .codex/skills/narrated-record-replay/Cargo.toml audio_retention && scripts/check-package-hygiene synthetic private artifact names

attempts.result_summary: The next live run will produce audio-chunks.jsonl, narration.sync.jsonl, and optional delay-comparison.json support. This improves the proof path but does not prove shared Record & Replay monotonic timing, drift correction, or low-delay suitability.

rows.next_action: Run a matching installed-plugin dogfood with --delay low, generate delay-evaluation.json, run delay-compare against the high baseline, and keep high as default unless final alignment quality and transcript/action usefulness are equivalent or better.
rows.required_proof: Realtime delay policy must be based on paired live dogfood evidence comparing high and low delay on final aligned transcript quality, latency, unresolved mismatches, diagnostic marker recall for scripted runs, and transcript/action window usefulness.
